title: Szatan z siódmej klasy
writer: Maria Kaniewska, Kornel Makuszynski, Roman Niewiarowicz
actors: Józef Skwark, Stanislaw Milski, Pola Raksa
plot: During summer holidays spent in an old palace, an inquisitive teenager is looking for a treasure, which was hidden by a Napoleonic soldier. What he's unaware of is that a bunch of criminals is also looking for the same thing.
